<?php namespace Knuckles\Scribe\Attributes; use Attribute; #[Attribute(Attribute::IS_REPEATABLE | Attribute::TARGET_FUNCTION | Attribute::TARGET_METHOD | Attribute::TARGET_CLASS)] class ResponseField extends GenericParam { // Don't default to string; type inference is currently handled by the normalizer // TODO change this in the future public function __construct( public string $name, public ?string $type = null, public ?string $description = '', public ?bool $required = true, public mixed $example = null, /* Pass 'No-example' to omit the example */ public mixed $enum = null, // Can pass a list of values, or a native PHP enum, public ?bool $nullable = false, public ?bool $deprecated = false, ) { } }
